case_title: LEONARD PEOPLES VS. JOHNNY J. WHITE JR.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-11-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LEONARD PEOPLES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHNNY J. WHITE JR. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE AFFIDAVIT OF UNSUCCESSFUL SERVICE; FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLES, LEONARD AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE JR., JOHNNY J.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF LEONARD PEOPLES APPEARED. DEFENDANT JOHNNY WHITE JR. DID NOT APPEAR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PEOPLES, LEONARD AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE JR., JOHNNY J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLES, LEONARD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
